name: RPlog_The_Price_of_Freedom
title: A Royal Reserve for the Lorda
summary: In the opulent Hutt-built hall of the Ol'jeliic Clan on Nar Shaddaa, the Falleen crime lord Nasiri Gejalli holds court over a den of pirates and smugglers. The Alderaanian operative Drax Rendolen arrives bearing a rare bottle of Alderaanian Royal Reserve and, after a tense greeting at gunpoint, buys an audience to ask about a missing friend -- the Jedi Johanna Siri te Danaan, abducted by a Trandoshan bounty hunter during a sabacc tournament. Over shared wine, Drax negotiates for information, ultimately paying thirty thousand and the friend's holo-image. Nasiri points him toward the rough cantinas and port records, confirming the hunter is the fringe Trandoshan Nachkt'lyssk, and warns Drax that angry Wookiees have placed a twenty-thousand bounty on his own head. The two trade veiled speculation about a disciplined group emptying Wookiee villages, and Drax departs with leads in hand and a growing list of enemies.
